name: Joyride : Lowpoly World
short_description: Joyride is a low-polygon style racing game with a top-down view. Different seasons have different scenery, and different locations have different driving pleasures. Here you can race, go off-road, explore hidden routes, complete difficult driving to get a completely different racing experience.
detailed_description: Joyride: Lowpoly World is a branch of the Joyride series. It is a low-polygon style casual racing game with a top-down perspective. The game contains a number of different tracks, covering all seasons and all seasons. With a variety of different scenery and terrains, you can enjoy the beautiful scenery along the way as you like, or you can choose any track to start racing. You can also discover hidden locations and items in the game, purchase vehicles or vehicle upgrades to improve various abilities.
about_the_game: Joyride: Lowpoly World is a branch of the Joyride series. It is a low-polygon style casual racing game with a top-down perspective. supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Russian*, Japanese*, Traditional Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
